Title: Verify the project's main components
Test Steps:
1. Identify the main components of the project from the UML diagrams.
2. Verify that the components are correctly named and described.
3. Ensure that the relationships between components are accurately depicted.
Expected Result:
The main components of the project are correctly identified, named, and described, and their relationships are accurately depicted.

---

Title: Verify Map Point class attributes and operations
Test Steps:
1. Identify the Map Point class.
2. Verify that all attributes are correctly named and described.
3. Verify that all operations are correctly named and described.
4. Create an instance of the Map Point class and set valid values for all attributes.
5. Call each operation and verify the returned values.
Expected Result:
All attributes and operations of the Map Point class are correctly named and described, and they function as expected.
